notes: v1.0.7 - Multi-format questions: adds fill-in-the-blank and short-answer question types alongside multiple choice and free response. Free-response parts can now carry their own figures. Question editor has a type switcher and per-type editors (insert-blank, answer lines); New question menu lets you pick a type. AI import, the answer key, printing, and .tbbank sharing all handle every type. Mr. Levy's Unit 1A bank now includes its free-response dotplot problem.
